summary: The user asked whether all left-rail GUI sections are represented on the DAG task list.
The user asked whether the large dataset-size figure was 17 GB or 1788 GB and flagged that the larger number felt huge.
The assistant clarified that several left-rail sections are still not explicitly represented on the DAG.
The assistant clarified that the full 24B-goal corpus estimate is about 1788.14 GB, while the minimum tuning-start estimate is about 8.94 GB.
captured_user_directives: Check whether all left-rail GUI sections are on the task list.
Clarify the meaning of the displayed GB figures for the 24B goal.
captured_assistant_responses: The current DAG only partially covers the left rail and still misses Training Run, Dataset, ETA Tracker, Trace Capture, Steering Log, and Mutex Open/Held.
1788.14 GB is the intended full corpus estimate, while 8.94 GB is only the estimated minimum to begin training or tuning.
